verify.rule: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials (Al 7075 and CFRP).
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests on prototype to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Standoffs may not provide sufficient clearance for PCB components.
risk.mit: Review PCB component heights and adjust standoff heights accordingly.

risk.desc: Service panel may obstruct access to critical components during maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure service panel design allows for full access without obstruction.

risk.desc: Insufficient documentation on fastener patterns and preload torques.
risk.mit: Document all fastener patterns and specify preload torques in assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Lack of detailed thermal management plan for rail guides and deployable rail grooves.
risk.mit: Develop a thermal management strategy to ensure proper heat dissipation.

risk.mit: Use high-quality contacts and conduct electrical arc testing.

risk.desc: Risk of mechanical failure at the revolute bearing due to unexpected loads.
risk.mit: Conduct load testing and incorporate safety factors in the design.
